creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
> And we have a number of ports that cause such dependency loops when built with non-default options.

ez:
# pkg info -r gdk-pixbuf2 libheif jasper | grep -E 'jasper|libheif|gdk-pixbuf2'
gdk-pixbuf2-2.40.0_4:
        libheif-1.12.0.62_1
libheif-1.12.0.62_1:
        jasper-3.0.4
jasper-3.0.4:
        gdk-pixbuf2-2.40.0_4
